transcript: the movie camera lens these precision optics can cost up to $50,000 apiece while digital technology has replaced film cameras lenses are now a perfect hybrid of old and new technology to focus accurately and control light for each shot on top of the inner barrel a low Thanks for watching! accurately and control light for each shot on top of the inner barrel a low friction tough polymer stud fits into a spiral channel on the inside of the focus ring just like on a regular camera as turns, the inner barrel slides forwards and backwards. This moves the glass discs inside to give a razor sharp focus. Inside a metal ring sit eight overlapping stainless steel leaves just two thousandths of an inch thick miniature pivots link them together to form a circular pattern as the ring turns it opens and closes the leaf formation changing the size of the hole at the center just one smooth motion controls the exact amount of light entering the camera the lens's oscar winning look is down to modern technology and old-fashioned craftsmanship working in harmony
